name: Balsamic Marinade
recipeIngredient: 2 Creole or Beefsteak tomatoes, sliced 1/4-inch thick
2 cups sliced assorted wild mushrooms (chantrelles, shiitaki, oyster)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Season the vegetables with 2 tablespoons of olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Place all the vegetables on the grill (except for the mushrooms) and grill for 2 minutes on each side.
4. In a mixing bowl, whisk together the olive oil, vinegar, shallots, garlic, and basil. Season the marinade with salt and pepper.
5. Remove the vegetables from the grill.
6. In a glass soufflé bowl, alternate layering the different vegetables.
7. Pour the marinade over the vegetables and allow to marinate for 12 hours or overnight.
8. Either serve the vegetables in the glass container or on a platter.
9. Garnish with parsley.
Yield: 6 servings
